title: helichrysum abietifolium subsp. abietifolium
intro: Helichrysum abietifolium subsp. abietifolium, also known as Mountain Everlasting or Mountain Helichrysum, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and heal various health issues. The health benefits of Helichrysum abietifolium subsp. abietifolium include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve circulation, and support the immune system, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its health benefits.
